protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes doubled parsed integers or parse errors, given strings, producing Result descriptions.
parsed.signature_b: B computes a quotient or error, given two integers, producing a Result value.

same_problem.why: The programs compute different outputs or solve different requested tasks.

same_domain.why: Both operate on shared domain(s): integers, results.
